			FROM $feed_locator_table_name

		  	$group_by
		  	LIMIT %d

$wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare("
			SELECT *

		  	$group_by
		  	LIMIT %d
			OFFSET %d;", $args['feed_id'], CFF_Db::RESULTS_PER_PAGE, $offset), ARRAY_A)

$wpdb->get_results("
			SELECT *
			FROM $feed_locator_table_name
			WHERE feed_id NOT LIKE '*%'

			SELECT id
			FROM $feed_locator_table_name
			WHERE html_location = 'unknown'
